provisions.title: Standard time of Namibia
provisions.content: The standard time of Namibia is two hours in advance of the Greenwich Mean Time.

provisions.title: Repeal of laws
provisions.content: The Namibian Time Act, 1994 (Act No. 3 of 1994 ) is repealed.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: This Act is called the Namibian Time Act, 2017. History of this document 24 October 2017 this version Published in Government Gazette 6449 Commenced 06 October 2017 Assented to Related documents [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Facebook Page Visit our Twitter/X profile About NamibLII NamibLII is a project of the Law Reform and Development Commission managed by the Directorate: Law Reform of the Ministry of Justice of the Republic of Namibia. In terms of the Law Reform and Development Commission Act, 1991 (Act No. 29 of 1991), the Commission is mandated to consolidate or codify any branch of the law or to introduce other measures aimed at making the law more readily accessible. NamibLII is the embodiment of this mandate making annotated statutes, judgments, and gazettes available in a user-friendly format.
